channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [美伊对峙] PRESIDENT → AMERICAN : Fight with small arms and light weapons (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: PRESIDENT / AMERICAN. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] IRAN → BAHRAIN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Chicago, Illinois, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: IRAN / BAHRAIN. Location: Chicago, Illinois, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] MILITARY → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Sirik, Hormozgan, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MILITARY / nan. Location: Sirik, Hormozgan, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [苏丹内战] UNITED KINGDOM → POLICE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Sudan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: UNITED KINGDOM / POLICE. Location: Sudan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [苏丹内战] SUDANESE → MIGRANT : Kill by physical assault (Sudan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Kill by physical assault. Actors: SUDANESE / MIGRANT. Location: Sudan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIAN → RUSSIA : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Balashikha, Moskovskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIAN / RUSSIA. Location: Balashikha, Moskovskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → PALESTINIAN : Abduct, hijack, or take hostage (Yesha, HaDarom, Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Abduct, hijack, or take hostage. Actors: ISRAEL / PALESTINIAN. Location: Yesha, HaDarom, Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: MILITARY / LEBANON. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Employ aerial weapons. Actors: LEBANON / ISRAELI. Location: Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: MEDICAL OFFICIAL / PROTESTER. Location: Sanaa, Sana', Yemen. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 20 sources.
